summary_en: 14,000,000 shares (4.90% of shares outstanding) | ¥5,000M upper limit | Open-market purchase via Tokyo Stock Exchange | May 15, 2026 to May 14, 2027 | Stated purpose: enhanced shareholder returns and improved capital efficiency
title_en: Notice Regarding Determination of Matters Relating to Acquisition of Own Shares (Acquisition of Own Shares Based on Articles of Incorporation Provisions under Article 459(1) of the Companies Act)
translation_en_brief:
TOPPAN Holdings Inc. announced on May 14, 2026 that its Board of Directors resolved to acquire its own shares pursuant to the Companies Act Article 459(1) and the company's articles of incorporation.

The buyback program authorizes acquisition of up to 14,000,000 shares (4.90% of shares outstanding, excluding treasury stock) for a maximum aggregate consideration of ¥5,000,000,000. Purchases will be conducted via open-market transactions on the Tokyo Stock Exchange beginning May 15, 2026 and concluding no later than May 14, 2027. The company stated the primary rationale as strengthening shareholder returns and improving capital efficiency.

As of April 30, 2026, the company held 285,425,837 shares outstanding (excluding treasury) and 9,280,403 treasury shares, with a separate note that 1,885,600 shares held in a share grant ESOP trust are excluded from the treasury count.
